import React,{createContext,useContext,useState,useEffect}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();export function AuthProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[user,setUserState]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);// Load persisted user from localStorage on mount
